questions.question: Explain the difference between guided and unguided media in the context of physical layer transmission. Provide an example of each type of medium.
questions.hint: Describe the characteristics of each medium and their use cases.

questions.question: Describe the TCP/IP protocol suite, including its 4-layer model, and explain the role of each layer in data communication.
questions.hint: Focus on the relationship between the OSI model and TCP/IP model.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the OSI model and the TCP/IP model, highlighting their similarities and differences. Explain why both models are used.
questions.hint: Emphasize the importance of understanding both models in computer networking.
